"[13] A1 ALL NIGHT NEG DRIVER AVAIL, WILL BE 7-8 HRS TO BE BACK IN AREA "
"[11] RASOR TOWING ETA 3HRS+, LANDOLL ON CALL DOWNHILL "
"[10] RASOR RD TOWING NEG ANS X2 "
"[7] 73-77 START 1185 24 FT FB TRLR LOADED W/ ANOTHER TRLR and TRASH - TIRES ARE BLOWN -- POSS WILL NEED HD, MED, OR LOWBOY -- ATL VIN"
